description: Builds and renders a widget from a param-supplied or inline definition object.

defaultValue.description: Widget definition to render. Use "$param_name" to read from a canvas param, or provide a literal { type, props } object.

showEditor.description: Show a collapsible JSON editor panel for inspecting/editing the widget definition.

editorCollapsed.description: Whether the editor panel starts collapsed.

editorHeight.description: Optional initial height in pixels. If omitted, height auto-fits JSON line count.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "padding: 8px")

aiBuilderMode.description: Whether the AI widget builder is active. When true, shows the AI panel. AI actions require authentication.

aiModel.description: AI model used by the widget builder. Defaults to Claude Sonnet.

aiPanel.description: Position of the AI panel when aiBuilderMode is true. 'top'/'bottom' show a compact input bar above/below the widget. 'left'/'right' show a full chat panel as a side column.

allowedWidgetTypes.description: Comma-separated list of widget types that may be rendered (e.g. "div,text,text-input"). Use "all" to allow every type.

initialPrompt.description: When set and aiBuilderMode is true, this prompt is automatically submitted to the AI on first load.
